name: Chicken Korma
description: Mildly spiced chicken cooked with tomato, onion, cashew nuts, almond and coconut with fresh cream to finish.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Chicken tikka cooked in a tomato based gravy enriched with fresh cream, cashew nuts and honey.

name: Chicken Jalfrezi
description: Chicken tossed with julienne of ginger, tomato and bell peppers in a tangy sauce tempered with carom seeds.

name: Chicken Karahi
description: Chicken breast cooked in caramelised onions, tomatoes, bell pepper, fresh green chilli, garlic and ginger.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Charcoal grilled chicken breast with chopped onions, tomatoes, cashew nuts and fresh cream.

name: Chicken Saag
description: Spinach based chicken curry cooked with aromatic spices.

name: Homestyle Chicken Curry
description: Chicken (off the bone) made with plum tomatoes, onions and roast cumin. Make it your own by adding potato, mushrooms or green peas (+70p per addition).

name: Dhaba Murg Chicken Curry
description: Traditional slow cooked chicken on the bone curry. Make it your own by adding potato, mushrooms or green peas (+70p per addition).

name: South Indian Garlic Chilli Chicken
description: Chicken marinated with garlic, chilli, curry leaf and coconut.

name: Murg Achari
description: Chicken cooked with onion, tomatoes & pickling spices.
